data.mission: Log in, show voice transformation, and extract Narrative DNA

visionDecision.reasoning: The first step in the mission is to 'Log in'. There is a clearly visible 'Login' button in the header of the page that directly corresponds to this action. Proceeding with login will allow further access to features required to complete the rest of the mission, such as 'show voice transformation' and 'extract Narrative DNA'.
visionDecision.visualContext: Login button in the top right corner of the header, next to 'Start Narrative'.

textContent: The page promotes 'IdeaToVideo', an AI-powered platform for founders to overcome marketing bottlenecks by generating multimodal content. It highlights common challenges, introduces its 'Multimodal Authority Engine' with a 3-step process, targets high-ticket services, and showcases a full content ecosystem. The page features strong calls to action to 'Stop the Bottleneck' and 'Start Your First Narrative'.

data.intent: Attempting to log in to the application.

visionDecision.reasoning: The mission explicitly states 'Log in' as the first step. The previous step was a click on the Login button, but the current URL is still the homepage and the Login button is still present. This indicates that the login process was either incomplete or did not lead to a new page. Clicking the 'Login' button again is the most logical next step to attempt to initiate or complete the login sequence before proceeding with other mission objectives like voice transformation or narrative DNA extraction.
visionDecision.visualContext: The page displays a marketing landing page with a 'Login' button in the top right corner. The URL is the base URL. No indication of a successful login or a login form is visible.

textContent: A landing page for an AI-powered content generation service called 'IdeaToVideo' or 'The Multimodal Authority Engine'. It addresses founders' marketing challenges, explains its features, outlines a 3-step process, and promotes creating professional video content to build brand authority. The design is dark-themed with strong red accents for calls to action.

data.action: click: Link with text '👉 Stop the Bottleneck'
data.intent: Initiating narrative creation / core application workflow, which encompasses login and other mission objectives.

visionDecision.reasoning: Previous attempts to click 'Login' did not lead to a login state or page. The mission requires 'extract Narrative DNA' and 'show voice transformation', both of which are part of the narrative creation workflow. Clicking '👉 Stop the Bottleneck' navigates to '/narrative/new', which is the entry point for creating a narrative and thus for extracting Narrative DNA. This action will either lead to the narrative creation process directly or trigger any necessary login/authentication steps, thus addressing the 'Log in' part of the mission implicitly or explicitly.
visionDecision.visualContext: Large red button with white text '👉 Stop the Bottleneck' prominently displayed on the page, under the main header section, clearly indicating a primary action. It is a highly visible call to action.

componentsDetected: Client work always wins. Your feed goes silent, your pipeline dries up, and your brand authority fades.
You have expertise, but it's trapped in your head. Your audience doesn't know exactly why they need YOU.
Wasting hours in Canva or video editors instead of doing high-leverage work for your clients.
Your content isn't trust-focused, so it gets likes but doesn't start conversations with the right buyers.
One-time setup: Extract your positioning, unique mechanism, and brand voice. Takes 2-3 minutes.
Recurring: Transform any idea into videos or carousels in 30 seconds. Use your narrative again and again.
Export professional 1080p videos ready to post on LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, or YouTube.
Extract your 'Narrative DNA' once. This informs every piece of content the AI creates for you.
Generate cohesive story arcs across 3-5 episodes. Perfect for LinkedIn, Instagram, and TikTok storytelling.
Transform screen recordings into polished demos. We draft the script and add a professional AI voiceover for you.
textContent: The page presents a marketing tool called 'IdeaToVideo' which aims to help founders with their marketing by creating multimodal content. It highlights common marketing bottlenecks, explains its 'Multimodal Authority Engine' through features like narrative intelligence and content generation, outlines a 3-step process to get started, details a full content ecosystem, and includes several calls to action encouraging users to 'Stop the Bottleneck' and 'Start Narrative'.

visionDecision.reasoning: The mission requires me to 'extract Narrative DNA'. The button 'Start Your First Narrative' is positioned directly below this description and links to '/narrative/new', which is the expected next step after clicking 'Stop the Bottleneck'. This action will likely lead to the page where I can begin the narrative DNA extraction process.

textContent: A marketing landing page for 'IdeaToVideo,' an AI-powered platform designed to help founders and high-ticket service providers overcome marketing bottlenecks by creating high-quality, multimodal content. It highlights common marketing challenges, introduces its unique 'Multimodal Authority Engine' solution, outlines a simple 3-step process, details its content ecosystem, and provides several prominent calls to action to 'Stop the Bottleneck' or 'Start Narrative.' The page uses a dark theme with strong red accents.

data.action: click: Link with text 'Start Your First Narrative' located under 'Getting Started in 3 Simple Steps' section.
data.intent: Initiate narrative creation and DNA extraction process

visionDecision.reasoning: The mission requires showing voice transformation features and extracting Narrative DNA. The 'Getting Started in 3 Simple Steps' section clearly outlines 'Create Your Narrative' as the first step, which involves extracting 'positioning, unique mechanism, and brand voice'. This directly aligns with the mission objectives. Clicking the 'Start Your First Narrative' button associated with this step (Link 5) is the most logical action to begin this process. The previous steps show repeated clicks on this text, but the current DOM context is still the homepage. Assuming the previous attempts didn't lead to navigation, I will click this button again, expecting it to navigate to '/narrative/new' as indicated in the DOM.
visionDecision.visualContext: On the main landing page, there is a section titled 'Getting Started in 3 Simple Steps'. Under step 1, 'Create Your Narrative', there is a large red button that says 'Start Your First Narrative'.

textContent: A landing page for 'IdeaToVideo', an AI-powered multimodal authority engine, targeting founders and high-ticket service providers. It explains the problem of marketing bottlenecks, introduces its features, provides a 3-step guide, and showcases its full content ecosystem, urging users to start their narrative.

data.mission: Explain the Multimodal Authority Engine landing page, highlighting the bottleneck problem and the 3-step solution.
